exact_prompt.text: FINAL EXACT PROTOCOL REVIEW. Read-only. Repo `/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack`. Review the complete current `round_13_protocol` object whose required SHA-256 is `b53bc2692fc65f478301597756217a097bb2b2627a74c4c3ef5cd82ef1684a76`, from plan `docs/evidence/adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-design/append-authorization-plan.json`, plus identical object in dossier, design note, corrected ADR/current-state/roadmap/P2b1 status text. Independently recompute protocol hash and assess the WHOLE protocol, not only a delta: same-OFD `/usr/bin/flock -xn 3`, retained bwrap/verified-FD confinement, deterministic repo staging, C0a/C0b/C1/Ccommit, bootstrap vs recovery authorization, target-first S0-S4, terminal COMPLETE/INCOMPLETE precedence, observation-bounded claims, real production ZFS/no-fallback Stage2, exact 8 Stage2 paths and 3 Stage3 repo paths, frozen tuple, no current implementation/append authority. Also verify status docs now state Round6 historical milestone vs Round13 six isolated contexts from only Anthropic/OpenAI and no Round13 participation claim for DeepSeek/MiniMax/Moonshot/Z.ai. Return verdict SIGN/REVISE/BLOCK and concise exact claims. State whether any strictly better in-scope protocol remains. Do not write.

exact_returned_output.text:
**Verdict: SIGN**

I recomputed the `round_13_protocol` SHA-256 from RFC8785-JCS bytes in both the plan and dossier:

- Plan protocol hash: `b53bc2692fc65f478301597756217a097bb2b2627a74c4c3ef5cd82ef1684a76`
- Dossier protocol hash: `b53bc2692fc65f478301597756217a097bb2b2627a74c4c3ef5cd82ef1684a76`
- Plan and dossier `round_13_protocol` canonical objects are byte-identical.
- Plan raw/self: `7dfded6e0b01af61b1362ff89deead0e2ec2a9b5142c5dffd823886a4f589d4f` / `f97b356a92d39a6a2567f242ee7f9c30acfd2d4511cda56b60af7c6cea8e33cc`
- Dossier raw/self: `487c50ba4582409f149edb2408af4019df7c2ad0407227b325d64c4fc7a26fad` / `5b3052af6987c97726599dc69e940e45aeb9812cd420a4861a8a8ded1973213d`
- All six review records are JCS+LF/self-valid, bind the same protocol hash, and record `SIGN`.

Substantive protocol assessment passes. The object covers same-OFD `/usr/bin/flock -xn 3`, no PID/mtime/token lock artifacts, retained bwrap/verified confinement, retained verified evidence-dir FD/procfs dirfd-relative repo writes, deterministic no-replace repo staging, C0a/C0b/C1/Ccommit, distinct bootstrap vs recovery authorization freshness rules, target-first S0-S4, terminal `COMPLETE` / `target_durable_evidence_incomplete` precedence, observation-bounded incomplete claims, real production ZFS-only Stage 2 with no fallback, exact Stage 2 and Stage 3 output surfaces, frozen tuple, and explicit non-authority for implementation, append, commit/push, restart, P2a CAS, P2b/runtime, and `.abrain` mutation.

The exact future Stage 2 create paths are the eight listed in the protocol, and all are currently absent. The exact future Stage 3 repo outputs are the three listed in the protocol, and all are currently absent. The second-level shard and event target are also currently absent.

The corrected status text is consistent across the design note, ADR 0040, current-state, roadmap, and P2b.1 note: Round 6 is historical six-vendor architecture evidence; Round 13 is six isolated review contexts from two actual providers only, 3 Anthropic and 3 OpenAI; no Round 13 participation is claimed for DeepSeek, MiniMax, Moonshot AI, or Z.ai.

No strictly better in-scope protocol remains identified. No writes performed.
